text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 09. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
